name: useFileDialog
examples: const { values, open, reset } = useFileDialog((value) => console.log(value));
const { values, open, reset } = useFileDialog({ accept: 'image/*' });

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback to execute when a file is selected

source.source: * @param {(value: FileList | null) => void} callback The callback to execute when a file is selected
